view.name: Supplier order details

view.name: Supplier order line details
view.description: Review one supplier order line including product, quantities, expected dates, source, and evidence.

edit.name: Edit supplier order line
edit.description: Edit ordered quantity, received quantity, unit cost, expected dates, and notes for one supplier order line.

addNew.name: Create supplier order line
addNew.description: Create one supplier order line for an existing supplier order.

view.name: Supplier lead time details
view.description: Review one supplier lead-time evidence row.
